race.description: Courtney Keeffe Elders Real Estate Hcp
race.comment: SOUTHLAND (1) looks a handy galloper on the way up, ending last campaign with a 0.3L defeat over 1200m here when jumping the favourite. The form out of that worked out well and he's unbeaten in his first-up efforts, both over this track and trip. Maps to get every chance and can keep his unbeaten fresh record intact. UNDERCOVER SNIPER (2) stuck on well fresh to be 0.9L off the winner when off a 76-day break. Cheung's claim comes in handy and the inside draw is a big tick for his chances. Usually goes well second-up and can go one better today. CALEB (4) flew home to win over 1400m two back before a disappointing effort when out to the mile most recently. Now 49-days between runs, He comes back to 1100m where he jumped favourite second-up. Can bounce back. SALVADO (8) sat handy and got the job done off a long break last time out. No reason why he can't go on with the job. GOLD LIGHTNING (7) won't be far away if she runs up to recent efforts.
